name: sgldev
description: Spencer Lyon's personal development tools. Includes 7 agents (5 code reviewers + 1 code health auditor + 1 plugin releaser), 11 skills, and 3 hooks that power a persistent per-agent expertise system — agents accumulate codebase-specific knowledge in .expertise/models/<agent>.md across sessions via SessionStart, SubagentStart, and PostToolUse hooks.
